description: Case style: Analogue watch with a round stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Black dial with black hands and a fixed black bezel Strap style: Orange genuine leather strap with an orange stitch and a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Date aperture on the 3 hour mark and branding on the 12 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 1 year
